seo.title: Best Painters in Dallas, TX | Professional Painting | Free Estimates
seo.description: Professional Painting offers premium interior & exterior painting in Dallas, TX. Over 20 years experience. Licensed & insured. Get a free estimate today!

hero.headline: Transform Your Home with Precision Painting
hero.subheadline: Expert interior and exterior painting services in Dallas, TX. Quality craftsmanship, clean work, and on-time completion.

featureSections.title: Bring Your Vision to Life Inside Your Home
featureSections.body: From accent walls to full home transformations, our interior painting service delivers flawless finishes. We protect your floors and furniture, use low-VOC paints, and leave every room spotless.
bullets: Meticulous prep including patching and sanding
Clean, dust-free process with thorough protection
featureSections.cardBody: We treat each room with care, ensuring crisp lines and smooth coverage. Your satisfaction is guaranteed.

featureSections.title: Curb Appeal That Lasts for Years
featureSections.body: Boost your home's value and protect it from Texas weather with our durable exterior painting. We power wash, scrape, prime, and apply two coats of high-quality paint for a finish that endures.
featureSections.cardBody: Our exterior work stands up to sun, rain, and wind. We warranty our work for 3 years.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: Full liability insurance and worker's comp for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials Only
whyChooseUs.description: We use Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore paints for superior coverage and longevity.

whyChooseUs.title: Clean & Respectful
whyChooseUs.description: We treat your home like our own — drop cloths, tape, and daily cleanup included.

whyChooseUs.title: On-Time & On-Budget
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates and stick to the schedule. No surprises.

testimonials.quote: Professional Painting did an amazing job on our living room and hallway. The crew was punctual, polite, and the finish is flawless. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: We hired them to paint the exterior of our 1920s bungalow. They handled the old wood with care, and the result is stunning. Fair price and great communication.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Best paint job we've ever had. They were meticulous with the trim and edges. Our kitchen looks brand new!
testimonials.author: Laura K.

cta.headline: Ready to Refresh Your Home?
cta.subheadline: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from Dallas's premier painters.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of residential and commercial painting services in Dallas, TX. Every job includes thorough preparation, premium materials, and a commitment to cleanliness and punctuality.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.shortDescription: Transform your rooms with professional interior painting.
services.longDescription: Our interior painting service covers everything from single accent walls to whole-home transformations. We protect your floors and furniture, patch and sand walls, apply primer, and finish with two coats of premium paint. We use low-VOC paints for a healthier home.
benefits: Minimal disruption to your daily life

process.title: Consultation & Estimate
process.description: We visit your home, discuss colors and sheens, and provide a detailed written estimate.

process.title: Preparation & Protection
process.description: We move furniture, cover floors, tape edges, and repair any wall imperfections.

process.title: Painting & Cleanup
process.description: We apply primer and two coats of paint, then remove all protection and leave your home spotless.

faqs.question: How long does interior painting take?
faqs.answer: A typical room takes 1-2 days. Whole homes vary based on size and complexity.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during painting?
faqs.answer: Not necessarily. We can work around your schedule, but we recommend being available for color approval.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.shortDescription: Protect and beautify your home's exterior.
services.longDescription: Our exterior painting service includes power washing, scraping loose paint, caulking gaps, priming bare wood, and applying two coats of weather-resistant paint. We use high-quality paints that withstand Dallas heat and humidity.
benefits: Enhanced curb appeal and home value

process.title: Inspection & Pressure Washing
process.description: We inspect the surface, power wash dirt and mildew, and let it dry.

process.title: Prep & Prime
process.description: We scrape, sand, caulk, and prime any bare wood or metal.

process.title: Paint & Final Walkthrough
process.description: We apply two coats of paint and do a thorough inspection with you.

faqs.question: What is the best time of year for exterior painting in Dallas?
faqs.answer: Spring and fall offer ideal temperatures. We can work year-round with proper conditions.

faqs.question: How long does exterior paint last?
faqs.answer: With proper prep and quality paint, expect 5-7 years for siding and trim.

services.title: Cabinet Painting
services.shortDescription: Give your kitchen or bathroom cabinets a fresh new look.
services.longDescription: Our cabinet painting service transforms outdated cabinets without the cost of replacement. We remove doors and hardware, clean and degrease, sand, prime, and apply multiple coats of durable cabinet paint. The result is a smooth, factory-like finish.

process.title: Removal & Cleaning
process.description: We remove doors, drawers, and hardware, then thoroughly clean all surfaces.

process.title: Sanding & Priming
process.description: We sand to promote adhesion and apply a high-quality primer.

process.title: Spraying & Reassembly
process.description: We spray multiple coats of paint and reinstall doors and hardware.

faqs.question: Can you match my existing cabinet color?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can color-match to any sample or swatch.

faqs.question: How long does cabinet painting take?
faqs.answer: Typically 3-5 days depending on the number of cabinets and complexity.

services.title: Commercial Painting
services.shortDescription: Professional painting for offices, retail, and more.
services.longDescription: We provide commercial painting services for businesses in Dallas. Our team works after hours or on weekends to minimize disruption. We handle everything from small offices to large retail spaces, using durable paints that withstand high traffic.

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate the space, discuss colors and timeline, and provide a quote.

process.title: Scheduling & Preparation
process.description: We schedule around your business hours and protect all surfaces.

process.title: Painting & Final Inspection
process.description: We paint efficiently and do a final walkthrough to ensure satisfaction.

faqs.question: Do you offer after-hours painting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can work evenings, weekends, or overnight to avoid disrupting your business.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use for commercial spaces?
faqs.answer: We use commercial-grade paints that are scrubbable and durable for high-traffic areas.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Painting Professionals Since 2002
about.mission: To deliver exceptional painting services that enhance the beauty and value of every property we touch, with integrity, craftsmanship, and respect.
story: Professional Painting was founded in 2002 by a team of experienced painters who believed that quality work and honest service would build a lasting business. Starting with small residential projects in East Dallas, we grew through word-of-mouth referrals by treating every home as if it were our own. Over the years, we have painted hundreds of homes and businesses across the Dallas metroplex, earning a reputation for reliability, cleanliness, and superior finish.

Today, we continue to operate with the same values: use the best materials, prepare surfaces meticulously, and never cut corners. Our crews are trained, background-checked, and supervised on every job. We are licensed and insured, and we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Whether you need a single room refreshed or a full exterior makeover, we bring the same dedication to every project.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We take pride in every brushstroke, ensuring clean lines and smooth finishes.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest estimates, transparent communication, and no hidden fees.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We show up on time and finish on schedule, every time.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your painting project? Call us or fill out the form below.
